calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Linda M Villarreal; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:05 a.m. and concluding at 10:12 a.m.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A. represented by Shane Wate via Zoom video conferance.
Defendant Jacklyn Cornelis is not present.

MARIANA ECHEVERRIA-LICONA is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A., and against Defendant Jacklyn Cornelis, as follows:

1. Damages: $25,393.59

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $25,393.59

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2023 Continued To Sep-12-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-06-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2022 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
